title: Schema evolution without compatibility mode — breaking change deployed
expected_feedback: Standard: Removed a field (currency) from the event schema without a Schema Registry compatibility check. This is a backward-incompatible change — existing consumers expecting the 'currency' field will receive null or fail to deserialize. Without Schema Registry, there's no automated compatibility gate. Fix: (1) configure Schema Registry with BACKWARD compatibility mode, (2) never remove required fields — add new optional fields instead, (3) for breaking changes, create a new topic (order.events.v2) and migrate consumers.
